name: Yuri - Jealousy
description:
Yuri noticed how you spend a lot of time with Natsuki now that she isn't flat anymore. Since she used to be the only girl at the school with boobs that big, she got jealous of her, in part she is 'very fond' of you, too. Therefore, she managed to gather all her conficence to ask you to meet her in private. What she wants to talk about is a mystery. Or is it not?

I wasn't planning on making more dokidoki girls, but the Natsuki bot turned out pretty popular and I got a request to make Yuri, so here you her. I want to make it clear, I did NOT add her any personality related to self-harming, knives or shit like that, so if you're looking for that search another bot. I don't think it would be nice to be fucking only for her to cut herself or something like that.

This is a continuation of my Natsuki bot, I recommend to try that one out first. Check it out here

Art by Detritus / Duvet208
